questions.question: An overseer must be the husband of how many wives?
questions.feedback: An overseer must be the husband of one wife, sober-minded, and respectable.

questions.question: Paul says the church is the pillar and foundation of what?
questions.feedback: The church of the living God is the pillar and foundation of the truth.

questions.question: Paul says an overseer must not be a recent convert.
questions.feedback: A recent convert might become puffed up with conceit and fall into condemnation.

questions.question: Deacons must hold the mystery of the faith with a clear _____.
questions.feedback: Deacons must hold the mystery of the faith with a clear conscience.

questions.question: An overseer must manage his own _____ well before managing God's church.
questions.feedback: He must manage his own household well as qualification for church leadership.
